text: Darkness ray - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a darkness effect to them.
Darkness Absorption - inflicts a darkness effect on entities within a 12 block radius.
Dark power transfer - distributes one of 4 forms of dark elemental powers to other players (provided they have no active elemental powers).
Cloak of Darkness: +35% damage, –45% incoming damage.
Dark Mantle: 30% chance to apply one of: "Weakness II", "Slowness II", "Stun", or "Blindness".
